ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "athlete_name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the athlete represents */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sport the athlete participates in */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "current_age" INTEGER /* Current age of the athlete */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the athlete in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the athlete in kilograms */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the athlete's coach */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the athlete's team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "national_anthem" TEXT /* National anthem of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sport */,
  "equipment" TEXT /* Equipment required for the sport */,
  "rules" TEXT /* Rules governing the sport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "olympic_games" (
  "games_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Olympic Games */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the Olympic Games took place */,
  "host_city" TEXT /* Host city of the Olympic Games */,
  "closing_ceremony_date" TEXT /* Date of the closing ceremony */,
  "total_athletes" INTEGER /* Total number of athletes participating */,
  "total_countries" INTEGER /* Total number of countries participating */,
  "opening_ceremony_date" TEXT /* Date of the opening ceremony */,
  "mascot" TEXT /* Mascot of the Olympic Games */,
  "slogan" TEXT /* Slogan of the Olympic Games */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("games_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athlete_participation" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation record */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "games_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Olympic Games */,
  "age_at_games" INTEGER /* Age of the athlete during the Olympic Games */,
  "qualification_date" TEXT /* Date the athlete qualified for the Olympic Games */,
  "qualification_event" TEXT /* Event in which the athlete qualified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_participation_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athlete_participation_games_id FOREIGN KEY ("games_id") REFERENCES olympic_games ("games_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medals" (
  "medal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medal record */,
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete's participation in the Olympic Games */,
  "gold_medals" INTEGER /* Number of gold medals won */,
  "silver_medals" INTEGER /* Number of silver medals won */,
  "bronze_medals" INTEGER /* Number of bronze medals won */,
  "total_medals" INTEGER /* Total number of medals won */,
  "medal_ceremony_date" TEXT /* Date of the medal ceremony */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medals_participation_id FOREIGN KEY ("participation_id") REFERENCES athlete_participation ("participation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sport the event belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance or duration of the event */,
  " Rules" TEXT /* Rules governing the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result record */,
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete's participation in the Olympic Games */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the athlete in the event */,
  "time_or_score" TEXT /* Time or score achieved in the event */,
  "heat_number" INTEGER /* Heat number of the event */,
  "lane_number" INTEGER /* Lane number of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_participation_id FOREIGN KEY ("participation_id") REFERENCES athlete_participation ("participation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data entry, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., athlete, event, medal) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "date_published" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)
